name: Playa del Carmen
tagline: Caribbean Beach Life on a FIRE Budget
description: Playa del Carmen offers the rare combination of turquoise Caribbean waters, walkable town center, and a massive international expat community that makes the transition seamless. While pricier than inland Mexico, it remains a fraction of comparable beach destinations in the US or Europe, making it ideal for FIRE retirees who refuse to compromise on beach access.

quickFacts.visa: Temporary Resident Visa (1-4 years, renewable; requires proof of income ~$2,500/mo or savings ~$42,000)
quickFacts.safetyRating: Moderate — generally safe in tourist zones and residential areas; exercise standard caution
quickFacts.climate: Tropical — hot and humid with a rainy season June-November, hurricane risk

housing.description: 1BR condo near 5th Avenue or in Playacar Phase 2, walking distance to beach

dining.description: Mix of local taco joints and casual beachfront spots; cooking at home most nights

healthcare.description: IMSS public insurance with occasional private clinic visits in Cancún

transportation.description: Bicycle as primary transport, colectivos for longer trips, occasional taxi

entertainment.description: Beach days, snorkeling, cenote visits, 5th Avenue people-watching, sunset drinks

1M.lifestyle: You roll out of bed, walk five minutes to the Caribbean, and spend mornings swimming in impossibly clear water. Afternoons are for exploring cenotes or cycling along the coast. Budget is tighter here than inland Mexico — you cook at home often and favor the local taco stands over tourist restaurants — but you're living steps from one of the world's most beautiful coastlines every single day.

housing.description: Modern 2BR condo in Playacar or beachfront building with pool, rooftop, and security

dining.description: Regular beachfront dining, fresh ceviche lunches, international restaurants on 5th Avenue

healthcare.description: Private insurance with access to Hospiten and other quality Riviera Maya clinics

transportation.description: Scooter rental, taxis, ADO bus for Cancún trips, occasional car rental for ruins visits

entertainment.description: Scuba diving certification, beach clubs, yoga retreats, weekend trips to Tulum and Cozumel

2M.lifestyle: Your poolside condo is a two-minute walk from the beach, and you take full advantage — morning yoga on the sand, midday dip in a cenote, afternoon ceviche at your favorite beachfront palapa. Weekends mean island-hopping to Cozumel for world-class diving or exploring Mayan ruins at Cobá. The international community means friends from every continent, and the vibe is permanently relaxed.

housing.description: Luxury 2-3BR condo in beachfront complex with rooftop pool access and ocean views

dining.description: Fine dining at Playa's best restaurants, beach club lunches, catered dinner parties occasionally

healthcare.description: Premium private insurance, wellness-focused healthcare, Cancún specialist access

transportation.description: Leased SUV for Riviera Maya exploration, private airport transfers, ferry passes

entertainment.description: Premium beach club memberships, kitesurfing lessons, spa days, catamaran sailing trips

3M.lifestyle: Your condo's rooftop pool overlooks the Caribbean — the kind of view people pay $500/night for at resorts. You split days between beach clubs, diving excursions, and leisurely long lunches. A private guide takes you to hidden cenotes the tourists never find. This is the Riviera Maya at its absolute best, with the freedom to say yes to every adventure that presents itself.

housing.description: Beachfront villa in Playacar or exclusive gated community with private pool, garden, and direct beach access

dining.description: Private chef several nights a week, unlimited resort-quality dining, wine collection

healthcare.description: Platinum private insurance, concierge medicine, annual US checkups, wellness retreats

transportation.description: Luxury SUV with occasional driver, private transfers, yacht day-charters

entertainment.description: VIP access at all beach clubs, private yacht excursions, deep-sea fishing, golf at Grand Coral

domesticHelp.description: Full-time housekeeper, part-time cook, pool and garden maintenance staff

luxuryExtras.description: Private catamaran charters, exclusive Tulum club memberships, bespoke Mayan cultural experiences

5M.lifestyle: Your beachfront villa has a private path to the sand, a pool surrounded by tropical gardens, and a full-time staff that keeps everything running. Mornings start with fresh juice by the pool, afternoons on your chartered catamaran, evenings with a private chef preparing freshly caught lobster. The Riviera Maya's luxury scene caters to you personally — this is resort living without ever checking out.

housing.description: Oceanfront estate in exclusive Mayakoba or Playacar enclave with multiple buildings, infinity pool, and private beach

dining.description: Full-time private chef, exclusive restaurant access, imported delicacies, curated wine cellar

healthcare.description: Global concierge healthcare, anti-aging treatments, private wellness facility, medical flights if needed

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle collection, yacht ownership, helicopter transfers to Cancún airport, private flights

entertainment.description: Private island day trips, world-class golf, exclusive art events, deep-sea sportfishing yacht

domesticHelp.description: Full estate staff: chef, housekeepers, groundskeepers, driver, boat captain, personal assistant

luxuryExtras.description: Yacht mooring, Mayakoba resort memberships, private archaeological tours, philanthropic projects in Mayan communities

10M.lifestyle: Your Mayakoba estate is a private paradise — an infinity pool melts into Caribbean views, a personal chef prepares three meals daily from the freshest catch, and your yacht captain has the boat ready whenever the mood strikes. You host unforgettable gatherings under palapa roofs with the sound of waves as your soundtrack. At this level, the Riviera Maya is not just a retirement destination — it's your personal tropical empire.
